{{Quote|Spiders don't frighten you because most spiders are are no bigger than your hand. These spiders, webweavers? Big as you and me.|Han Solo|<ref name="Life Debt" />}}
'''Webweavers''' were a large [[species]] of [[spider]]s indigenous to the [[planet]] [[Kashyyyk]]. They were capable of devouring [[human]]s. [[Wookiee]]s [[Hunting|hunted]] and [[Diet|ate]] the spiders.

Infant webweavers were larger than a human hand and lived in nests with numerous individuals.<ref name="Legends">''[[Legends of the Alliance]]''</ref>

During the [[liberation of Kashyyyk]]<ref name="Life Debt" /> in [[5 ABY]],<ref name="Life Debt Date">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''[[Aftermath: Life Debt]]'' to [[5 ABY]].</ref> [[Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca]], and their allies released a swarm of webweaver spiders aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|Imperial Star Destroyer]] ''[[Dominion]]''. The spiders proceeded to [[Death|kill]] [[Rear Admiral]] [[Urian Orlan]] and several [[stormtrooper]]s. This allowed Han and his team to force their way aboard the [[Starship|ship's]] [[Bridge (starship)|bridge]].<ref name="Life Debt" />
